Close

CE Driver

  • Let's Work
  • Western Flanders
  • Published on Jobat.be 18 days ago
Permanent Full-time

Create your Jobat profile and we will immediately redirect you to the website where you can apply.

Every day, this innovative food company ensures the delivery of fresh products to the hospitality sector and large-scale catering kitchens. More than 300 colleagues work together to make this possible.

As a true leader in the industry, they value their employees just as much as their customers. Training, quality, and teamwork form the foundation of their success.

CE Driver

Job description

As a CE driver, your day looks like this:

  • Morning shift: between 4 a.m. and 5 a.m. you load the truck and get ready to depart

  • Careful deliveries: you deliver orders safely and correctly to customers

  • HUB deliveries: you drive to the HUB in Brussels or Antwerp to drop off your load

  • Afternoon off: by around 1 p.m. your workday is finished and you have the rest of the day for yourself

Profile

  • Correct documents: you have a valid CE driving licence and Code 95

  • Experienced driver: with at least 2 years of experience, you feel completely at home on the road

  • Strong communication skills: you speak and write fluent Dutch, so you can easily assist customers and handle administration

  • Hands-on mentality: you enjoy staying active and like physical work. ; you load and unload without difficulty

Offer

  • € 18 per hour

What's in it for you:

  • Extra free time: you are always home on Sundays and get an additional day off during the week

  • Attractive salary package: you earn €18.21 per hour, plus €9.50 in meal vouchers

  • Travel allowance: you receive a commuting allowance or bicycle allowance

  • Great working atmosphere: you work in a friendly, flexible, family-like environment where everyone knows each other

Does this sound like something for you? Call us quickly and discover your new job.

Create your Jobat profile and we will immediately redirect you to the website where you can apply.

Function type:
Truck driver
Location
Western Flanders
Requirements
Primary education At least 2 years experience Dutch

Are you looking for Truck driver jobs in Western Flanders?

You've come to the right place, Jobat.be has 371 of Truck driver jobs available in Western Flanders.

The most Truck driver jobs are found in 3600 Genk, 9000 Gent and 8800 Roeselare.
